title: OPTIMAP: Geospatial discovery of research articles based on open metadata
description:
OPTIMAP is a geospatial discovery portal for research articles based on open metadata. Built with Django/GeoDjango and PostgreSQL/PostGIS, it enables users to discover scientific works through map-based search, temporal filtering, and spatial metadata. Works are harvested from OAI-PMH and RSS/Atom sources, optionally enriched via OpenAlex, and exposed through a REST API, GeoRSS/GeoAtom feeds, and downloadable GeoJSON/GeoPackage data dumps.

OPTIMAP is part of the KOMET project (https://projects.tib.eu/komet), a joint initiative of TUD Dresden University of Technology and the TIB – Leibniz Information Centre for Science and Technology. It continues work from the OPTIMETA project (https://projects.tib.eu/optimeta), a joint initiative of the Institute for Geoinformatics (ifgi) at the University of Münster and the TIB – Leibniz Information Centre for Science and Technology. A live instance is operated at https://optimap.geo.tu-dresden.de.
